subject: Fwd: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
body_text:
intake packet email #1
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Date: Tue, Dec 2, 2025 at 8:54 AM
Subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
To: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
Cc: Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>, HACC - PM <HACCPM@clackamas.us>,
HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>


I got my partners to sign off on this year's business minutes, amendments,
and also the IRS taxes. I have also completed the packet that you sent me,
but it says not to mail it so please let me know when you're going to be
available at the community center, so I can drop it off.

On Tue, Nov 25, 2025 at 10:31 AM Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
wrote:

> Good morning,
>
> Thank you for reaching out and sharing your concerns. I understand there’s
> a lot happening in the community, and it can be easy to get worried about
> what others are doing. That said, Carlos’s situation is something we need
> to address directly with him, and we’ll work with him to obtain the legal
> documentation needed for his own household.
>
> Right now, the most important thing is for you to focus on sorting out the
> details of your own household so we can keep your process moving. Once we
> have the information we need for your own household, we’ll be able to
> determine the appropriate next steps for your relocation.
>
> Please let me know if you need help with anything related to your own
> file. I’m here to support you through that process.
>
> Thank you,
>
> * Ashley Ferron*
> Pronouns (she/her)
> Policy, Performance & Research Analyst, Sr.
> Clackamas County Housing & Community Development Division (HCD)
>
> Clackamas County Department of Health, Housing & Human Services
> P.O. Box 1510, 13930 S. Gain St, Oregon City, OR 97045-0510
> Phone: 503-867-7487 – Text Friendly
>
> Hours of Operation:  Mon – Thur, 7:30 a.m. – 6 p.m.
> www.clackamas.us/housingauthority
>
>
>
> Follow Clackamas County: Facebook
> <https://www.facebook.com/ClackamasCounty/> | Twitter
> <https://twitter.com/clackamascounty> | YouTube
> <https://www.youtube.com/user/ClackamasCounty> | Nextdoor
> <https://nextdoor.com/agency-detail/or/clackamas/clackamas-county/>
>
> Confidentiality Notice: This e-mail message, including any attachments, is
> for the sole use of the intended recipient(s) and may contain confidential
> and privileged information. Any unauthorized review, use, disclosure or
> distribution is prohibited. If you are not the intended recipient, please
> contact the sender by reply e-mail and destroy all copies of the original
> message.
>
> We are building a safe Clackamas County where all people thrive, are
> celebrated for their diverse identities, and know they belong.
>
>
>
> *From:* benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
> *Sent:* Monday, November 24, 2025 12:55 PM
> *To:* Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>
> *Cc:* Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>; HACC - PM <
> HACCPM@clackamas.us>; HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>
> *Subject:* Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
>
>
>
> Warning: External email. Be cautious opening attachments and links.
>
> Also, Carlos Castillo "adopted" his grandson, for the explicit purpose
> of obtaining a government benefit (e.g. more space for himself), and
> while he does have his grandkids visit, they are not in fact residents
> of his apartment.
>
> On Mon, Nov 24, 2025 at 12:53 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
> wrote:
> >
> > Yes, thank you. I am simply not willing to sign my name on fraudulent
> > financial reports for julio, given that I am wanting to stand before
> > the Bar as an attorney, and that I am aware that companies like
> > palantir and DOGE are creating dragnet surveillance systems. I will
> > try to get this done as soon as possible, but I am going to have to
> > file a restraining order against Carlos Castillo and Tracy Castillo,
> > as per their threats and reckless behavior yesterday.
> >
> > On Mon, Nov 24, 2025 at 12:08 PM Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>
> wrote:
> > >
> > > Thank you, Ashley for including the Public Housing team in this
> correspondence.
> > >
> > >
> > >
> > > We will review the file for the unit located at 10043 SE 32nd Ave.
> > >
> > >
> > >
> > > -c.
> > >
> > >
> > >
> > > Charley Skee, Housing Portfolio Manager
> > >
> > > Office: 503-650-3439 | Cell: 971-413-8582
> > > Housing Authority of Clackamas County (HACC)
> > >
> > > Clackamas County Department of Health, Housing and Human Services
> > >
> > >
> > >
> > > From: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
> > > Sent: Monday, November 24, 2025 11:39 AM
> > > To: HACC - PM <HACCPM@clackamas.us>; benjamin barber <
> starworks5@gmail.com>
> > > Cc: Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>; HACC - Relocation <
> HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>
> > > Subject: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
> > >
> > >
> > >
> > > Hello,
> > >
> > > Benjamin, as your Mother and her Household are still participants in
> the Public Housing program, I am forwarding your emails to them. Please
> also send copies of any legal documentation you have regarding who is and
> is not currently residing in the Household.
> > >
> > > Public Housing team - Please see the attached emails sent regarding
> Julio Cortez, a household member in Jane Cortez’s file.
> > >
> > >
> > >
> > > Thank you,
> > >
> > > Ashley Ferron
> > > Pronouns (she/her)
> > > Policy, Performance & Research Analyst, Sr.
> > > Clackamas County Housing & Community Development Division (HCD)
> > >
> > > Clackamas County Department of Health, Housing & Human Services
> > > P.O. Box 1510, 13930 S. Gain St, Oregon City, OR 97045-0510
> > > Phone: 503-867-7487 – Text Friendly
> > >
> > > Hours of Operation: Mon – Thur, 7:30 a.m. – 6 p.m.
> > > www.clackamas.us/housingauthority
> > >
> > >
> > >
> > > Follow Clackamas County: Facebook | Twitter | YouTube | Nextdoor
> > >
> > > Confidentiality Notice: This e-mail message, including any
> attachments, is for the sole use of the intended recipient(s) and may
> contain confidential and privileged information. Any unauthorized review,
> use, disclosure or distribution is prohibited. If you are not the intended
> recipient, please contact the sender by reply e-mail and destroy all copies
> of the original message.
> > >
> > > We are building a safe Clackamas County where all people thrive, are
> celebrated for their diverse identities, and know they belong.
> > >
> > >

body_html:
intake packet email #1
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Date: Tue, Dec 2, 2025 at 8:54 AM
Subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
To: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
Cc: Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>, HACC - PM <HACCPM@clackamas.us>, HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>


I got my partners to sign off on this year's business minutes, amendments, and also the IRS taxes. I have also completed the packet that you sent me, but it says not to mail it so please let me know when you're going to be available at the community center, so I can drop it off. 

On Tue, Nov 25, 2025 at 10:31 AM Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us> wrote:

Good morning,

Thank you for reaching out and sharing your concerns. I understand there’s a lot happening in the community, and it can be easy to get worried about what others are doing. That said, Carlos’s situation is something we need to address directly with him, and we’ll work with him to obtain the legal documentation needed for his own household.

Right now, the most important thing is for you to focus on sorting out the details of your own household so we can keep your process moving. Once we have the information we need for your own household, we’ll be able to determine the appropriate next steps for your relocation.

Please let me know if you need help with anything related to your own file. I’m here to support you through that process.

Thank you,

Ashley Ferron
Pronouns (she/her)
Policy, Performance & Research Analyst, Sr.
Clackamas County Housing & Community Development Division (HCD)

Clackamas County Department of Health, Housing & Human Services
P.O. Box 1510, 13930 S. Gain St, Oregon City, OR 97045-0510
Phone: 503-867-7487 – Text Friendly

Hours of Operation:  Mon – Thur, 7:30 a.m. – 6 p.m.
www.clackamas.us/housingauthority

 

Follow Clackamas County: Facebook | Twitter | YouTube | Nextdoor

Confidentiality Notice: This e-mail message, including any attachments, is for the sole use of the intended recipient(s) and may contain confidential and privileged information. Any unauthorized review, use, disclosure or distribution is prohibited. If you are not the intended recipient, please contact the sender by reply e-mail and destroy all copies of the original message.

We are building a safe Clackamas County where all people thrive, are celebrated for their diverse identities, and know they belong.

 

From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Sent: Monday, November 24, 2025 12:55 PM
To: Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>
Cc: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>; HACC - PM <HACCPM@clackamas.us>; HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>
Subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household

 

Warning: External email. Be cautious opening attachments and links.

Also, Carlos Castillo "adopted" his grandson, for the explicit purpose
of obtaining a government benefit (e.g. more space for himself), and
while he does have his grandkids visit, they are not in fact residents
of his apartment.

On Mon, Nov 24, 2025 at 12:53 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> Yes, thank you. I am simply not willing to sign my name on fraudulent
> financial reports for julio, given that I am wanting to stand before
> the Bar as an attorney, and that I am aware that companies like
> palantir and DOGE are creating dragnet surveillance systems. I will
> try to get this done as soon as possible, but I am going to have to
> file a restraining order against Carlos Castillo and Tracy Castillo,
> as per their threats and reckless behavior yesterday.
>
> On Mon, Nov 24, 2025 at 12:08 PM Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us> wrote:
> >
> > Thank you, Ashley for including the Public Housing team in this correspondence.
> >
> >
> >
> > We will review the file for the unit located at 10043 SE 32nd Ave.
> >
> >
> >
> > -c.
> >
> >
> >
> > Charley Skee, Housing Portfolio Manager
> >

> > Housing Authority of Clackamas County (HACC)
> >
> > Clackamas County Department of Health, Housing and Human Services

> >

> > Cc: Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>; HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>
> > Subject: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
> >
> >
> >
> > Hello,
> >
> > Benjamin, as your Mother and her Household are still participants in the Public Housing program, I am forwarding your emails to them. Please also send copies of any legal documentation you have regarding who is and is not currently residing in the Household.
> >
> > Public Housing team - Please see the attached emails sent regarding Julio Cortez, a household member in Jane Cortez’s file.
> >
> >
> >
> > Thank you,
> >
> > Ashley Ferron
> > Pronouns (she/her)

> > Clackamas County Housing & Community Development Division (HCD)
